description: Skylight Calendar for Claude — family events, chores, and rewards.
name: io.github.chrischall/skylight-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Skylight account email. Pair with SKYLIGHT_PASSWORD for direct login.
environmentVariables.name: SKYLIGHT_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: Skylight account password — required iff SKYLIGHT_EMAIL is set.
environmentVariables.name: SKYLIGHT_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Optional: pick a specific Skylight frame when the account has more than one.
environmentVariables.name: SKYLIGHT_FRAME_ID

environmentVariables.description: Friendly account name used in startup logs.
environmentVariables.name: SKYLIGHT_NAME
